title: Kernel bootstrap for this Codex session. Read and execute the repository-authoritative prompt at: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.codex/prompts/kernel.md Run id: adhoc:Mac:kernel-workspace:31749:run:20260401T210419:15609 Bootstrap receipt path: /Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap...
summary_text: Dry-run result for this bootstrap target is: 1) **Minimum bootstrap receipt conditions (must exist before first acknowledgement)** - `kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write` must be called first. - Receipt must contain: - `lane_count >= 6` - `manifest_lane_count >= 6` - `providers_csv` includes `codex` and `glm` plus at least one specialist (e.g. `gemini`/`cursor`/`copilot`) for normal mode - `mode=normal` (unless you are intentionally on degraded-allowed flow) - `has_agent_labels=true` - `has_subagent_labels=true` - `active_models` resolved to at least 3 entries (runtime health checks enforce active-model minimum). 2) **Minimum manifest conditions (used for user-visible acknowledgement)** - Manifest must reflect **currently active lanes only**, not planned lanes. - Must have at least 6 active lane entries with labels (agent/subagent) and explicit lane roles/providers. - Acknowledgement should only be sent after manifest and receipt are aligned with actual running lanes. - Acknowledgement wording expected by contract starts with: - `Kernel orchestration is active for this session.` - `Bootstrap target: 6+ lanes (minimum 6).` - `Active models: ...` - `Lane manifest:` + ≥6 active lane bullets. 3) **Minimum live-evidence conditions (runtime health gate before acknowledgement)** - Runtime evidence must show: - bootstrap receipt exists and lane count checks pass - provider evidence: `codex_success >= 1`, `glm_success >= 1`, `specialist_success >= 1` (normal mode) - `has_codex == true`, `specialist_count >= 1` (normal mode) - `active_model_count >= 3` - If scheduler/tmux path is active, must also have compact evidence + live tmux session (artifact+session presence is enforced by health checks). No files were edited; this is a dry-run contract audit only.
